projects.title: Dark Matter Model Statistical Analysis
projects.subtitle: Bayesian Analysis of Milky Way Satellite Data
projects.description: Advanced Warm Dark Matter particle mass constraints to >4 keV/c? through Bayesian analysis of Milky Way satellite galaxy data.
projects.extendedDescription: Advanced Warm Dark Matter particle mass constraints by comparing model predictions against Milky Way satellite observations. Cut runtime by 100x by optimizing computational bottlenecks, authored a methods summary for an upcoming publication, presented findings at the 2023 OSU Physics Summer Research Program poster session, and published the code and writeup on GitHub.
projects.impact: Advanced particle mass constraints to >4 keV/c? and made the analysis practical to run by delivering a 100x runtime improvement.
